zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾艾比 多雷
zh.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Scudmore於1280年出生在英國賀福爾艾比 多雷時，他的父親Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch26歲，母親Clara de Whelan21歲。他和Jane Baskerville至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1352年在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年72歲。

zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾艾比 多雷
zh-hans.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Scudmore于1280年出生在英国賀福爾艾比 多雷时，他的父亲Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch26岁，母亲Clara de Whelan21岁。他和Jane Baskerville至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1352年在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scudmore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Cudmore Farm in Bampton, Devon, which is named with the Old English personal name Cudda + Old English mōr ‘moor, marsh’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Scudmore was born in 1280, in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, his father, Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch, was 26 and his mother, Clara de Whelan, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Jane Baskerville. He died in 1352, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Scudmore est né en 1280, à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Clara de Whelan, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Jane Baskerville. Il est décédé en 1352, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Scudmore 1280 in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch 26 und seine Mutter Clara de Whelan 21. Er hatte mit Jane Baskerville mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1352 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Scudmore è nato il nel 1280 nel Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Clara de Whelan, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Jane Baskerville. Morì nel 1352, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.1348: から1348年1月9日まで1349年1月8日
ja.Kentchurch, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアケントチャーチ
ja.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニー
ja.Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーア
ja.Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイア
ja.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Scudmoreが1280年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアで生まれた時，父Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurchは26歳，母Clara de Whelanは21歳であった。彼はJane Baskervilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1352年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Scudmore(이)가 1280년 영국 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Clara de Whelan(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Jane Baskerville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1352년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

lv.1348: no 1348. gada 9. janvāra līdz 1349. gada 8. janvārim

pt.1348: de 9 de janeiro de 1348 a 8 de janeiro de 1349
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Scudmore nasceu em 1280, em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Clara de Whelan, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Jane Baskerville. Ele faleceu em 1352, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Scudmore родился в 1280 г. в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Clara de Whelan, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Jane Baskerville. Он умер в 1352 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 72 лет.

es.1348: desde 9 de enero de 1348 hasta 8 de enero de 1349
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Scudmore nació en 1280, en Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Scudamore Lord Kentchurch, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Clara de Whelan, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Jane Baskerville. Murió en 1352, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 72 años.
